label: 1302_states courthouse_courthouse_federal building_courthouse located
description: Legislation proposed by the House Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure aimed at renaming specific courthouse and federal buildings after notable individuals or events, reflecting local historical significance. These bills were reviewed for their fiscal impact but did not include detailed cost estimates.
